title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still can't access.

title: Payment Not Going Through
description: Customer reports that payment fails during checkout with an error message 'Transaction declined'.

title: Website Loading Slowly
description: User reports the main dashboard takes over 10 seconds to load on desktop.

title: Unable to Reset Password
description: Customer gets an error message when trying to reset password via email link.

title: Feature Request - Dark Mode
description: User requested to add a dark mode option in the settings page.

title: Mobile App Crash
description: App crashes immediately upon launch on Android version 12.

title: Billing Discrepancy
description: Customer charged twice for the same subscription period.

title: Email Notifications Not Received
description: User reports they are not receiving order confirmation emails.

title: Incorrect Order Details
description: Customer received wrong items in their order summary.

title: Feedback - Excellent Service
description: Customer praised the quick response time of support team.

title: Refund Request Pending
description: Customer requested a refund but hasn't received confirmation.

title: Broken Link on Help Page
description: Help page contains a link that leads to a 404 error.

title: Unable to Upload Files
description: User reports upload button doesn't respond on Chrome browser.

title: Subscription Auto-Renew Error
description: Customer’s subscription did not renew automatically despite being enabled.

title: Security Concern - Suspicious Login
description: Customer noticed unauthorized login attempts from unknown location.
